## ADD-NEW-COURSE.md §Stage 1b — Voice guide + glossary

**Produces:**

### content/{id}/_scratch/voice-guide.md
Encode course-specific register conventions for downstream authoring agents.
Must include:
- Second-person, declarative, ≤30 words/sentence, active voice rules (from STANDARDS).
- Course-specific format conventions derived from the topic-map terminology notes (professor's non-standard usage, domain-specific formatting).
- Banned patterns from STANDARDS.
- One example of a good sentence vs a defect sentence for this course's domain.

### content/{id}/_scratch/glossary.md
30–80 canonical terms. Every term appearing ≥2 times in the topic-map terminology notes with potential variant phrasing must have an entry.
Markdown table: Canonical | Variants to avoid | One-line definition | Source
